parameters.customBody:
={
    "includeWebResults": false,
    "language": "en",
    "locationQuery": "{{ $('Notion Trigger').item.json.location }}",
    "maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch":{{ $('Notion Trigger').item.json.number }} ,
    "maximumLeadsEnrichmentRecords": 0,
    "scrapeContacts": false,
    "scrapeDirectories": false,
    "scrapeImageAuthors": false,
    "scrapePlaceDetailPage": false,
    "scrapeReviewsPersonalData": true,
    "scrapeSocialMediaProfiles": {
        "facebooks": false,
        "instagrams": false,
        "tiktoks": false,
        "twitters": false,
        "youtubes": false
    },
    "scrapeTableReservationProvider": false,
    "searchStringsArray": [
        "{{ $('Notion Trigger').item.json.company_type }}"
    ],
    "skipClosedPlaces": false
}

json.title: Porto Salvo
json.description: Cozy spot resembling an old port tavern offering Italian fare, local draft beers & outdoor seating.

json.title: Mojitos
json.description: Latin-fusion place with a tropical vibe, featuring festive frozen drinks & colorful flower decor.

json.title: Seis Vecinos
json.description: This small, relaxed eatery features a menu of Mexican & Central American dishes.

json.title: Parrilla Azteca Cibaena Restaurant
json.description: Tacos, burritos & Mexican-inspired mains dished up in a bright locale with cocktails & basic tables.

json.title: Café Salamanca
json.description: Spacious Spanish mainstay featuring standards, tapas & cocktails plus guitar music Saturday nights.

json.title: Margarita's Restaurant
json.description: Straightforward restaurant specializing in Puerto Rican cuisine, including homemade pastelillos.

json.title: The Original Venice Restaurant
json.description: Compact, humble establishment offering pizza & typical Italian dishes, plus wine.

json.title: Pine Restaurant
json.description: Longtime Italian eatery featuring a raw bar & classic entrees, including steak & seafood dishes.

json.title: Maisonetta
json.description: Hip French-Mexican restaurant preparing creative meat & seafood dishes, plus tacos & cocktails.

json.title: Lido Harlem Restaurant
json.description: The bottomless-mimosa brunch is a draw at this sleek, warm Italian eatery on a Lower Harlem corner.
json.address: 2168 Frederick Douglass Blvd, New York, NY 10026

json.title: THEP Thai Restaurant
json.description: Bright, contemporary-style dining spot serving authentic Thai curries and stir-fries.

json.title: Lex Restaurant
json.description: Understated eatery turning out Italian & American dishes, from red-sauce standards to grilled steak.

json.title: Charlies Bar & Kitchen
json.description: Sophisticated global fare, brunch & cocktails in a vibrant space with exposed brick & bold art.

json.title: El Tina Harlem Restaurant
json.description: An array of traditional Latin American plates doled out in simple, compact quarters.

json.title: Massawa
json.description: East African eatery serves traditional Ethiopian & Eritrean fare scooped by hand with injera bread.

json.title: Mission Ceviche
json.description: Sit-down branch of a fast casual mini-chain serving Peruvian fare with a focus on ceviche.

json.title: Paola's
json.description: Authentic Italian fare draws crowds to this sophisticated Upper East Side eatery.

json.title: Il Miglio Brick Oven Pizzeria & Italian Restaurant
El Nuevo Rincon Del Sabor
json.address: 1047 St Nicholas Ave, New York, NY 10032

json.title: Barking Dog Restaurant
json.description: Brunches, a children's menu & a doggy drinking fountain bring the crowds to this American eatery.

json.title: Finestra Restaurant
json.description: Quiet, candlelit trattoria featuring familiar Italian flavors & occasional live music.

json.title: La Morada
json.description: Casual restaurant specializing in Oaxacan cuisine, with a lending library & a Poet in Residence.

json.title: Heidelberg Restaurant
json.description: This circa-1936 Yorkville eatery boasts rib-sticking German grub & plenty of beer to wash it down.

json.title: Melba's Restaurant
json.description: Southern classics served in a retro setting that's relaxed & homey by day, bustling in the evening.

json.title: Beatstro
json.description: Trendy restaurant dishing up Southern & Puerto Rican comfort foods, plus brunch staples & cocktails.

json.title: Rosa's At Park
json.description: Fashionable venue for cocktails, brunch & Latin American fare, plus an open-air rooftop lounge.

json.title: Xochimilco Family Restaurant
json.description: Hearty Mexican food favorites & aguas frescas served in a cozy, colorful space with a jukebox.
